changes.text: Multi-platform scheduling — Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Threads
Teams & role-based access (admin, full access, approval required)
Post approval workflow with scheduling enforcement
Drafts with pending approvals merged into a single tabbed view
Media library with image and video upload on convex
Posting streak tracker including platform-native posts
Self-hosted via Docker with automated Convex deployment on first run
